title: PolicyOverride
description: Machine-readable policy override registry. Temporary overrides for rules.md entries with reason, expiry, approver, and full audit trail. Old entries are never deleted — they are marked expired.

rule_id.description: Matches a rule slug from rules.md

action.description: disable = rule is skipped at runtime; modify = rule behavior is changed

modification.description: When action = modify, describes the changed behavior. Required if action = modify.

approved_by.description: Agent type who authorized this override (e.g. product-authority)

expired.description: false = currently active; true = past expiry or superseded by a newer override
